[15:35] And hast thou not there with thee Zadok and Abiathar the priests? therefore it shall be, that what thing soever thou shalt hear out of the king’s house, thou shalt tell it to Zadok and Abiathar the priests. [15:36] Behold, they have there with them their two sons, Ahimaaz Zadok’s son, and Jonathan Abiathar’s son; and by them ye shall send unto me every thing that ye can hear.
ed: n. 無知；愚蠢
cd: 形容某人的行為或建議缺乏智慧，不切實際。
ex: 形容詞或動詞的結果是缺乏理智和判斷力，通常指某個建議或行動不合時宜或不合理。
